response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most work centered on web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and minimal evidence of distributed systems or cloud compute leadership; while they demonstrate broad engineering curiosity and mentoring via workshops, their technical depth in the core domain is insufficient for this role.
strengths: Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops and open-source contributions.
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver full-stack solutions.
Active open-source contributor with tangible tools (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective).
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years of C++ development; C++ appears only in early or minor roles.
Lacks documented experience building or leading cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems.
No evidence of technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering or ownership of ambiguous infrastructure projects.
